scripts.embed: uv sync -q --project python && uv run --project python python/embed.py --input data/utterances.jsonl --output data/embeddings.bin
scripts.embed-beats: uv sync -q --project python && uv run --project python python/embed.py --input data/beats.jsonl --output data/beat-embeddings.bin --model BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5
scripts.pairs: uv sync -q --project python && uv run --project python python/pairs.py --data data
scripts.reconcile: uv sync -q --project python && uv run --project python python/reconcile.py --old-jsonl data/utterances.prev.jsonl --old-bin data/embeddings.prev.bin --new-jsonl data/utterances.jsonl --out-bin data/embeddings.bin
scripts.generic: uv sync -q --project python && uv run --project python python/generic.py --beats data/beats.jsonl --bin data/beat-embeddings.bin --out data/beat-generic.bin
